title: Diary of an 8-Bit Warrior
description: Experience Aetheria like a Terrarian! Complete quests, kill bosses, and level up your skills! Maybe you'll even meet Runt and his friends…
body:
![Diary of an 8-Bit Warrior mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b47c78779d846f02a911d0f884439baa0d75f79.png) # Diary of an 8-Bit Warrior, coming to Minecraft Ever dreamed of playing in Aetheria next to Runt, Breeze, and their friends? It's now possible! Will you be a hero like Kolb or a minion of the evil, serving Herobrine?
That's up to you in this RPG-like mod, a recreation of the universe from the popular book series Diary of an 8-Bit Warrior by Cube Kid. ![Availble for Neoforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/779bdfaf09f6982c7c79bbb547bbc158dfe641ee.png)
Join us on [Discord](https://teamminus.github.io/discord)!
Check our [other links](https://teamminus.github.io/links)! ## Aetheria, playable. ![Villagetown School](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44570dccbc322f95db138b1f2fd91be532b85669.jpeg) In Team Minus, we're are all fans of the book series, and wanted, like **you**, to play in this universe like Kolb or Ione used to. With this idea in mind, we decided to make this experience a reality and share it with other players so their dreams can come true! We base ourselves as much as possible on the original books written by Cube Kid, and plan to include all the content we can see in the Aetherian universe in this mod. The features are developed on our free time, so it might take time to update, please forgive us! If you want to keep in touch with us, join our [Discord](https://teamminus.github.io/discord)! ## Lost? Don't worry, it might not be easy to really know what to do at first. Our mod adds new gear (tools, weapons, armors, more?) that you can try to get to defeat the evil, Herobrine, in an peic boss fight! Of course, quests will guide you in your long jounrey to become the savior of Aetheria. _**(feature not implemented yet)**_ All content will be available on our [wiki](https://teamminus.github.io/mod-wiki) and is availble to read on the [Curseforge page](https://teamminus.github.io/mod-cf). ## Installation Troubleshooting For the best experience, follow this installation tutorial. 1. Download and install the Modrinth App. 2. Create a new instance in version Neoforge 1.21.1 Stable (if you don't see an option for Stable, keep it that way) (Neoforge 21.1.209) 3. Open the "Install content" menu. 4. In the "Mods" section, search for "Diary of an 8-Bit Warrior" an click "Install" 5. Go back to the instance. Curios API and Geckolib should have automatically been installed as well. If not, go back to manually install them 6. Optionally, for better performance, we recommend using Sodium and Lithium. It is **not** recommended to play using Optifine, as it is known to break other mods. We provide no official support for players using deprecated versions of the mod (Latest: 2.2, MC 1.21.1, NF 21.1.209) ## Licensing © 2025 Team Minus - All Rights Reserved, unless otherwise specified.
​This project is an independent creation based on Cube Kid's book series Diary of an 8-Bit Warrior and its spinoffs and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Cube Kid, Minecraft, Mojang Studios, or Microsoft. All rights to the original works remain with their respective owners.
